---
name: Support handoff
about: Provide sanitized information for an operational support question
title: "[Support]: "
labels: support
assignees: ""
---

## Environment

Describe the environment without sharing secrets or private endpoint details.

## Workflow

Workflow name, job id, or affected layer.

## Current status

Queue status, run id, batch id, and first failing upstream job if known.

## Failure evidence

Failure message, run-history step, and sanitized screenshots or sample rows.

## Expected vs actual

Describe what should have happened and what happened instead.
